title: Yummy Cake
body: # Yummy Cake **(Depending on the Mod Loader)** This Mod adds 7 new cakes! Each cake has a sliced variant which you can get with the new ***cake knife*** ![cakes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Command17/YummyCake/main/assets/cake.png) ## Recipes ### Choco Cake Gives you speed. ![cake](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Command17/YummyCake/main/assets/choco_cake_recipe.png) ### Creeper Cake Has a 50% chance to give you the explosive effect. ![cake](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Command17/YummyCake/main/assets/creeper_cake_recipe.png) ### Apple Cake Gives you some health. ![cake](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Command17/YummyCake/main/assets/apple_cake_recipe.png) ### Cloud Cake Gives you slow falling. ![cake](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Command17/YummyCake/main/assets/cloud_cake_recipe.png) ### Cookie Cake Gives you saturation. ![cake](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Command17/YummyCake/main/assets/cookie_cake_recipe.png) ### Sand Cake ![cake](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Command17/YummyCake/main/assets/sand_cake_recipe.png) ### Brownie Cake ![cake](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Command17/YummyCake/main/assets/brownie_cake_recipe.png) ### Cake Knife When right-clicked on a cake block, it will drop a slice. ![knife](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Command17/YummyCake/main/assets/cake_knife_recipe.png) ## Have fun!
